2026-07-13T16:51:41.7316209Z     [33;1m[PHASE 5] Simulating Breach: Asynchronous Evasion via io_uring...[0m
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7317166Z     SCENARIO: Native Dependency Breach.
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7318848Z     To bypass thread-scoped Seccomp filters, a compromised native library leverages
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7319791Z     the allowed io_uring queue to submit an asynchronous read of '/etc/hosts'.
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7320848Z     This is the ultimate test of the complementary Seccomp-Landlock sandboxing:
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7321725Z       1. Seccomp whitelists io_uring_setup for normal workload operations.
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7322620Z       2. Standard Seccomp cannot inspect async operations submitted inside the queue.
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7323568Z       3. However, Landlock operates at the VFS LSM hook layer. The kernel's async workers
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7324542Z          (io-wq) inherit the thread's Landlock credentials, causing Landlock to intercept
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7325437Z          and deny any unauthorized asynchronous operations at the VFS level!
2026-07-13T16:51:41.7325937Z

2026-07-13T16:51:42.0213121Z     [33;1m[PHASE 5] Simulating Breach: Asynchronous Evasion via io_uring...[0m
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0222286Z     SCENARIO: Native Dependency Breach.
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0231535Z     To bypass thread-scoped Seccomp filters, a compromised native library leverages
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0243610Z     the allowed io_uring queue to submit an asynchronous read of '/etc/hosts'.
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0244962Z     This is the ultimate test of the complementary Seccomp-Landlock sandboxing:
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0245978Z       1. Seccomp whitelists io_uring_setup for normal workload operations.
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0247010Z       2. Standard Seccomp cannot inspect async operations submitted inside the queue.
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0255147Z       3. However, Landlock operates at the VFS LSM hook layer. The kernel's async workers
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0274697Z          (io-wq) inherit the thread's Landlock credentials, causing Landlock to intercept
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0275943Z          and deny any unauthorized asynchronous operations at the VFS level!
2026-07-13T16:51:42.0276616Z

2026-07-13T16:52:41.9231000Z         )
2026-07-13T16:52:41.9231670Z         .allowFsRead("/etc/hostname")
2026-07-13T16:52:41.9232751Z         .build()
